reviews.review_description:
This game is sort of an arcady thing like marble blast from back in the day, however, I was disappointed at the lack of a pause menu, false advertising for the ability to customize, the visuals are so bad/fuzzy, the backdrops are so low res, the UI burns badly in the screen, causing noticeable screen burn in after a short session. Not sure if this is one of those AI generated games but I’m hoping the devs are able to add some care to this game because it could be great. They need to make a progression system so that you don’t always have to start all over each time. The message “Tap to play” appears at the start of each level, even though you can play without tapping it and then the words get in the way as you’re rolling around until you tap it. The devs should make it so that the message goes away and instead after the first time . Different game modes would be appreciated, like a timed mode, or multiplayer rumble mode with a bigger arena. I recommend the devs look into marble blast from the early 2000’s for reference. Giving the stars because I want to see more. 
P.S. found your website and it says your company keeps up with feedback and you make updates according to that. Not a word from you on this post yet, and it seems you’re lying to your clients.
